methods.name: FixedMap-NDT+ScanContext
methods.note: Fixed-map NDT: target map built once from GT/reference poses (stride=5, map_points=44000). Seed source=scan_context, accepted=107/107, rejected=0, seed fallbacks=0. ScanContext hits=107/107, top_k=10, NDT candidates evaluated=1070, mean distance=0.1789.
